body.title: Run full 17-step audit and produce findings report
body.result: Full 17-step audit completed. No critical failures. 329 tests pass. Findings: 58 dead habit code_refs (critical), 19 silent excepts (medium), 2 orphan modules (low). Stale files deleted. Report saved to audit_reports/audit_report_20260325.md. Ticketed: T-audit-findings-20260325.
body.description:
Run /audit (all 17 steps) and produce a findings report.

Steps: tests, file placement, code smells, registry coherence, inertia check, thread hygiene, log sizes, OR burn rate, DB schema, dead code/orphans, duplication scan, habit health, TWM push coverage, dependency hygiene, credential scan, simplification review.

For each finding:
- Small fix (silent except, missing log, typo): fix now and note it
- Medium/large: add to T-audit-findings-YYYYMMDD ticket for Akien review

Output the full findings report in the format from the audit skill.
Save findings to: ~/TheIgors/audit_reports/audit_report_20260325.md

After fixes: /commit with message "fix: post-audit small fixes — 2026-03-25"
